data.title: ⭐️ Support Us
data.content:
✨ If **%@** has been helpful, please consider giving us a **Star** on GitHub.

🚀 Your support helps more users discover the project and motivates us to keep improving.

🙌 Thank you for your support!

[Visit the GitHub repository and leave a Star](https://github.com/suhang12332/Swift-Craft-Launcher)
data.author: Swift Craft Launcher Team
